questions.prompt: The total elements in the Universal Set (U) is 40. Set A has exactly 20 elements. Fill the diagram.
questions.hint: Start with known values: Right=15, Outside=5. Sum so far = 20. Total is 40, so Circle A must have 40 - 20 = 20 items. We also KNOW A=20 from prompt! If A=20, then B∩A and Left must sum to 20. Actually, since U=40 and Right+Outside=20, A MUST be 20. If A=20, let's assume valid fill.
